results.notes: fjsp-schedule: model wrote empty schedule, then tried Python but timed out partially. job-makespan: full timeout (300s)

results.description: Added complete copy-paste Python solver script
results.notes: fjsp-schedule perfect. job-makespan: model garbled Python script when copying - corrupted nested quotes in job['operations'] to nonsensical string replacement expression, then failed to fix the edit

results.description: Replaced full script with pseudocode algorithm template - avoids nested quote corruption
results.notes: Both tasks perfect. Confirmed with second run (also 100/100 on both). Key insight: qwen3-30b corrupts complex Python code with nested string quotes when copying from skill markdown - pseudocode lets the model write its own clean implementation

changes_made: Replaced abstract problem formulation with step-by-step algorithm instructions
Changed from full Python script (which model garbled) to clear pseudocode template
Simplified constraint descriptions to short bullet points
Added explicit output format specification with exact JSON structure
Removed TypeScript constraint-checking code (not needed for solver guidance)
Removed repair heuristic section (greedy approach avoids needing repairs)
